hero.title: Jewelry born from your desire
hero.subtitle: Own production in Ukraine. Bespoke pieces and work from your reference.

create.title: Create your own piece
create.subtitle: A simple path from idea to finished jewelry
create.step1Desc: Send us your idea or a photo reference of the piece you want.
create.step2Desc: We choose the metal (585/750) and stone — natural or lab-grown diamond.
create.step3Desc: We calculate an individual price for your exact piece.
create.step4Desc: We craft the piece at our own production and deliver it to you.

can.title: What we can do
can.item1: A piece from your photo or idea
can.item2: In the style of renowned jewelry houses
can.item3: Melting your old gold into a new piece
can.item4: Natural and lab-grown diamonds with certificates

trust.title: Own production. Quality. Experience.
trust.subtitle: We control every step — from idea to finished jewelry.

finalCta.title: Let's create the jewelry of your dreams
finalCta.subtitle: Leave a request — we'll calculate individually
